reviews.title: 5 year fixed rate ISA.
reviews.text: Took the chance to take the 5 year fixed rate ISA. Only available for a short time in the 25/26 window. A market leading rate at the time. I was previously had a beehive savings product which transferred over automatically. As an existing app user I opened the account in minutes and deposited without issue on the same day. It seemed a prudent move given the uncertain future of cash ISAs.

reviews.title: All the staff are friendly, helpful, knowledgeable.
reviews.text: All the staff are friendly, helpful, knowledgeable. Put you at ease straight away in a relaxed & friendly atmosphere. Drink offered, toilets available too. Nothing too much trouble. Communications are excellent, either by post, email or phone,updating on products available, end dates, next steps etc etc. Used by the whole family, my mum, me & my children for a number of years now & we have all been very happy with all our various transactions, advice etc.

reviews.title: One very happy chappy!
reviews.text: I was completely new to the concept of Lifetime ISAs and money management, and they made it so simple for me, not only to understand and come to terms with, but to manage and engage with it afterwards as well! During a moment of emotional difficulty, they were incredibly supportive and understanding on the phone, and helped me to understand my options at the time. Their online portal and their App are really easy to use as well, informative and intuitive.

I would recommend them to anyone looking to save toward their future, whether that be for their first home, their children's higher education, or anything else. :)

reviews.title: I’m so glad I opened a LISA!
reviews.text: I have had a Lifetime ISA for 3 years. It was free to open my account and I get sent reminders and updates related to the tax year and interest rates. I have saved so much in this time (max amount) that if I continue for another 3 years I will have enough for a deposit on a house, even on a low income. I think the bank and scheme is fantastic, and having the 25% bonus removed if you withdraw money is a great way to never spend it. It’s also very easy to navigate, on the website and on the app. I trust this company, having found all the legal paperwork easy to understand with no catch. Due to my recommendations my family have also opened LISA’s with this bank. This service is opening doors for people that normally would’ve never been able to afford a house.

reviews.title: good interest rates

reviews.title: Do not recommend
reviews.text: Throughout my whole experience which has been a little under 12 months I have experienced nothing but problems. Unfortunately in my experience the broker I was dealing with liked to work at their own pace, as an example it took them 2 weeks to send off my proofs for approval and had no real reason as to why apart from 'I have been in meetings' Their communication was shocking throughout and since I have logged my last complaint about the process I have never heard from her since. Regrettably I have recommended 2 of my friends to use the Nottingham (this was before the problems started) and they have also experienced issues. One of them went to the bank instead after being messed around with proofs and the other is battling through. The only positive is they have no fees and one of the case handlers (Shaz) is about the only person who follows up when they say they will or completes anything in a prompt time frame. I would never consider using or recommending them again.

reviews.title: Bureacratic and poorly run
reviews.text: Moved my savings here after finding them on a maoney-saving site. Offered a good interest rate on an online account. I wanted instant access as am doing up my house and need to pay builders etc. Have tried to move funds to a current account but was made to jump through hoops: forms to be filled in which then had to be certified. Luckily, I have a friend who is a doctor so was able to get this done free of charge. Forms were all sent via snail mail which defeats the object of an online account. Hence, this took days rather than the minutes when amending details on a laptop. Forms also failed to arrive. I've asked them to close the account now. So, the 'instant' access has taken almost a month now. Oh, and they manged to leave a £1000 of mine in a 'suspended' account which made me even more frantic as I'd thought it had been lost. What is more, while they do pick up the phone quickly, you are then left on hold for 5-10 minutes which is far too long when you're paying for the call.

reviews.title: Where do I start
reviews.text:
Where do I start! Apart from it being the best bank / building society in my area . If I need to ring for an appointment I can contact the branch directly, whereas others you have to ring a call centre and then they say no appt. available go into branch and talk to someone at the counter,  They are also open later. They provide books which is so much better for older people who do not do on line banking .
I would like to mention I have been helped through my recent bereavement by Cheryl Pressley who was so patient helpful and a credit to the branch. She advised me , helped me and didn’t rush me. She is lovely.
All the staff are lovely at the branch . I would never move because of that. In my mind this beats trying to get 1/2 % more interest somewhere else.

reviews.title: It’s okay could be better
reviews.text:
Better than charter Savings Bank experience but still clunky on mobile. Feels like cobbled together set of a white label solution.

 Not using your domain name for the anccount area and instead using what appears to be a salesforce sub domain did not inspire confidence around security (had to check ownership of domain). Lack of instant payment integration made transfers, clunky.
Lack of app feels out of place compared to other financial services I use.
Identity verification felt cobbled together and again didn’t inspire secure account handling.  Returning back from identity service wasn’t great.

Have a look at trading 212 new account experience.  Their cash isa account setup was really impressed and made set up and transfer feel safe and extremely quick.  Clearly is a bespoke solution. It shows

reviews.title: Several days involving call/chats to open to an account!
reviews.text:
It took over an hour to open across 5 days to open a savings account and multiple calls/chats!

I applied on the Friday (I think about lunchtime) and then over the next few days I received several emails stating that I needed to finish the application but every time I logged on I received a message stating that it was pending approval.

I called on the Monday and was told that it had been held up because I had made a new application and should have simply done through my existing credentials. I was told the quickest solution was to make another application through my existing login.

I did that and had to go through all the ID checks again including uploading ID, etc! At the end of the application I entered the same broken loop as before! I received emails stating that I simply needed to log back in but I got the same message.

On the Tuesday I messaged my frustration and the chat agent said that they would investigate and get back to me, which they duly did and finally resolved.

I would seriously think twice about opening another account with Nottingham Building Society unless they addressed the process problems and communication.

reviews.text: Have branch based account and signed up to the app to view my balance so decided to open an online account as well. Easy to navigate and quick to sort out. Thanks for all the help at the Retford Branch for the assist to do this. 10/10

reviews.text: Visited your  Shepshed branch yesterday with my elderly aunt and uncle . I Would like to thank the staff for their kindness and patience in dealing with with us . Nothing was too much trouble for them . This was my third visit with them and I have always been impressed with the service received x

reviews.title: Quality customer service and very helpful
reviews.text:
I called into my local branch this morning to open a new isa, I saw a young lady called Hayley who helped me with the whole process of opening the account and also to transfer funds from a previous isa account.
She was polite, helpful and very professional, I would not hesitate to visit her again for any further assistance with my Nottingham building society accounts.

reviews.title: Went to the Sutton in Ashfield branch…
reviews.text: Went to the Sutton in Ashfield branch and got help from Hayley. Brilliant service, exceedingly friendly team. It’s fantastic to have a building society open 6 days a week serving the local community when so many other banks or building societies are shutting down and going online.

reviews.title: Better than the rest.
reviews.text:
Better than the rest.
Everyone at the branch in Sutton-in-Ashfield is so friendly and helpful.
The 'Nottingham' also offers a better savings rate than many other societies or banks.

reviews.title: A pleasant experience.
reviews.text:
Easy to make an appointment with local branch.
Staff very courteous and helpful. 
Gave full product information on savings/investment options.
Setup two accounts quickly with no fuss. 
Prefer the personal service given in branch compared to on-line chat robots and anxieties regarding device security and scams.
All in all a pleasant experience.

reviews.title: Very competitive product
reviews.text: Very competitive product, good bonus rate. Bonus Saver Account. Easy to set up. All good so far

However, the function of your App leaves a lot to be desired!!

reviews.title: New savings account in minutes….
reviews.text: Just set up a new savings account online using the Nottingham app. It couldn’t have been easier or quicker. I had the whole thing set up in minutes. Very impressive.

reviews.title: We needed a simple bank account to keep…
reviews.text: We needed a simple bank account to keep a small amount of money. This one offered a reasonable interest rate, no restrictions on withdrawals for 12 months. The on line application was simple but carried all the security details you would expect.

reviews.text: The property was clean & bright, the staff member was professional, friendly, knowledgeable, explained things clearing & I was made to feel very welcome.

reviews.title: Dealing with Nottingham Belper
reviews.text: Went in for two actions.  Pay money into one account and transfer money from one account to another ISA.Staff were extremely friendly and professional .  Passed on to another member to open the ISA.  The two actions were completed quickly and efficiently.  Very pleased.

reviews.title: Hassle sorting out an online account. I have been with the Nottingham for…
reviews.text:
I have been with the Nottingham for years and going in branch is fine but today I tried to set up an online account to view my accounts and it was a nightmare.
You can't just download the app from Playstore or where ever and  set it up that way, their website tells you not to download from there and do it through their own website. I have had 3 attempts today, all of which failed.
I am also with Skipton and  sorted an online account with them quickly and easily yesterday so no idea why the Nottingham have to make it so difficult.

reviews.title: Fantastic experience with The Nottingham
reviews.text:
I have managed to save with The Nottingham for my first home visit their Lifetime ISA. 
I have always had pleasant interactions with when I’ve had to communicate with them. It’s been simple to use, the app has an easy user interface and customer service has always been superb (especially Olivia Rainbow, she’s an absolute credit to your company).
I cannot recommend The Nottingham enough.

reviews.title: Always a good experience when visiting…
reviews.text: Always a good experience when visiting in branch. Face to face contact cannot be beaten, and the staff are always helpful and informative.

reviews.title: Just joined up with Nottingham building…
reviews.text: Just joined up with Nottingham building society.didn't start well when doing the online app.went through all the questions and it says finished once you press the green done button or close down.the done button wasn't working so closed down thinking that was it.i had a email come through a little later says you need to finish which I tried to going back in the app but message says we've run in to a little hiccup with your application as soon as sorted we will drop you a message.emails come through to finish the app but message still on there a little hiccup.rang them last Thursday says will pass to a manager. Monday came so rang them back in the afternoon and says will pass to a manager.received a email Tuesday up and running now.all good by the looks of it.2 stars taken of for the app not initially working and making 2 calls to chase up

reviews.title: Visited the Worksop branch yesterday…
reviews.text:
Visited the Worksop branch yesterday attending meeting with Cheryl to sort out accounts which had matured.
I feel compelled to write this review considering how polite and professional and helpful all the staff are in branch especially Cheryl who always takes time to discuss options leaving us feeling valued customers.
I really hope the senior management of the Nottingham Building Society appreciate the staff at the Worksop branch as much as we do as they provide a quality experience in my opinion which is a rarity these days as most banks etc seem to be intent on closing branches.
